register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Set up your zero-knowledge vault
register.processingSubtitle: Generating encryption keys. This may take a few seconds.

recoveryKit.title: Recovery Kit
recoveryKit.intro: Save this recovery key somewhere safe and private. With it you can reset your master password and keep all your vault data. It will not be shown again.
recoveryKit.warning: If you lose this key <1>and</1> forget your master password, your vault is gone for good. vaultctl is zero-knowledge - no one, not even an administrator, can recover it. There is no other way back in.
recoveryKit.confirm: I have safely stored my recovery key

errors.accountLocked: Account locked due to too many failed attempts
errors.bioMasterChanged: Master password changed - sign in once to re-enable Touch ID
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak - try a longer passphrase
